title: Counterattack Youth
description: A wedding to celebrate. Four friends in a pub. One evening that goes exactly as planned. Or so we thought. The evening completely off the rails. Counterattack: Youth is a 70-minute pub drama set entirely in a real pub, with the audience seated as fellow patrons at the next table. No stage. No distance. Just four women in their late twenties, a round of drinks, and every conversation they've been putting off. It is a little bit of everything: a celebration, an argument, a prank, a toast, and even a reminiscence about school days. But most importantly, it is one very honest conversation about what it actually means to be young right now.
